Spells-Warlock — Male Human Warlock: 10
Strength: 12 (+1) Dexterity: 16 (+3) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 14 (+2) Wisdom: 7 (-2) Charisma: 10 (+0)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Lawful Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Intelligence: 2; Strength: 1 Experience: 67660/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 180/360
Ability Notes: Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Warlock (Eldritch Invocation): 7; Warlock (Warlock Subclass): 1
Feats: Alert; Magic Initiate (Druid); Magic Initiate (Wizard) Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Warlock Features: Armor Training (Light); Contact Patron; Dark One's Blessing; Dark One's Own Luck; Eldritch Invocations; Eldritch Mind; Fiend Patron; Fiend Spells; Fiendish Resilience; Gift Of The Protectors; Investment Of The Chain Master; Magical Cunning; Mask Of Many Faces; Pact Magic; Pact Of The Blade; Pact Of The Chain; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, History, Intimidation, Investigation, Nature, Religion); Visions Of Distant Realms; Warlock Subclass; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons) Acolyte Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma); Magic Initiate (Cleric); Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion); Tool Proficiency (Calligrapher's Supplies)
Feature Notes:
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Warlock Subclass: 1 selection
Dark One's Own Luck: Can add 1d10 to an ability check or save once per long rest
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) +2 Performance: (cha) +0
Animal Handling: (wis) -2 Intimidation: (cha) +4 Persuasion: (cha) +4
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +2 Religion: (int) +6
Athletics: (str) +1 Medicine: (wis) -2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +3
Deception: (cha) +4 Nature: (int) +2 Stealth: (dex) +3
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) -2 Survival: (wis) -2
Skill Proficiency: Deception; Insight; Intimidation; Persuasion; Religion
Tool Proficiency: Calligrapher's Supplies: (dex)
Languages: Common; Dwarvish; Elvish
Skill Notes: Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Combat
Hit Points: 30 Initiative: +7 Armor Class: 15
Armor Training: Light Weapon Proficiency: Simple Weapons
Armor: Studded Leather Shield: None Weapons: Javelin (+5 1d6+1 P R30/120; Slow); Quarterstaff (+5 1d6+1 B [2h d8]; Topple); Spear (+5 1d6+1 P [2h d8] R20/60; Sap); Unarmed Strike (+5 1+1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +4 Initiative
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Strength Attack Adjustment: +1
Strength Damage Adjustment: +1
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Dark One's Blessing: Reducing a foe to 0 hit points gives self 10 temporary hit points; others reducing a foe within 10' to 0 hit points gives the same benefit
Pact Of The Chain: Can forego one attack to allow familiar to attack as a reaction
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +4; Constitution: +0; Dexterity: +3; Intelligence: +2; Strength: +1; Wisdom: +2
Save Notes:
Eldritch Mind: Has advantage on Constitution saves to maintain concentration
Fiendish Resilience: At the end of a rest, can gain resistance to a chosen non-force damage type
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: K0: 4; K: 10 Spell Slots: K5: 2 Attack: C: +2; D: +2; K: +4; W: +6 Spell DC: C: 10; D: 10; K: 12; W: 14
Spells:
Arcane Eye (K4 [Visions Of Distant Realms] Divi): R30' Self sees with Darkvision through a remote invisible eye that can move 30' per rd for concentration up to 1 hr
Astral Projection (K9 Necr): R10' Self and 8 willing targets project to the Astral Plane
Bane (K1 Ench): R30' 3 targets suffer -1d4 on attacks and saves (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Banishment (K4 Abju): R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min [+Level affects +1 target]
Befuddlement (K8 Ench): R150' Target suffers 10d6 HP psychic and loss of spells and Magic actions (save Intelligence half HP only; additional saves every 30 days end)
Blight (K4 Necr): R30' Inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half; plant target automatically fails) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Blindness/Deafness (K2 [The Fiend] Tran): R120' Inflicts a choice of blindness or deafness (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Burning Hands (K1 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Burning Hands (K1 [The Fiend] Evoc): 15' cone inflicts 3d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Charm Monster (K4 Ench): R30' Target becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Charm Person (K1 Ench): R30' Target humanoid becomes charmed by self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until harmed [+Level affects +1 target]
Chill Touch (K0 Necr): Touch inflicts 2d10 HP necrotic and target cannot regain hit points until the end of the next turn
Circle Of Death (K6 Necr): R150' 60' radius inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +2d8 HP]
Command (K1 [Fiend Spells] Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Command (K1 [The Fiend] Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Comprehend Languages (K1 Divi): Self understands all languages for 1 hr [R]
Contact Other Plane (K5 Divi): Contact with an extraplanar being inflicts 6d6 HP psychic and incapacitated on self until a long rest (save DC 15 Intelligence negates and gives one-word answers to 5 questions) [R]
Contact Other Plane (K5 [Contact Patron] Divi): Contact with an extraplanar being inflicts 6d6 HP psychic and incapacitated on self until a long rest (save DC 15 Intelligence negates and gives one-word answers to 5 questions) [R]
Counterspell (K3 Abju): R60' Negates foe casting (save Constitution negates)
Create Undead (K6 Necr): R10' 3 corpses become ghouls that obey commands within 120' for 24 hr; additional castings extend the duration for 24 hr [+Level creates 4 ghouls; 5 ghouls, 2 ghasts, or 2 wights; or 6 ghouls, 3 ghasts, 3 wights, or 2 mummies at level 7, 8, or 9]
Darkness (K2 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Demiplane (K8 Conj): R60' Creates a door that leads to a 30'x30'x30' extradimensional room for 1 hr
Detect Magic (K1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Dimension Door (K4 Conj): Teleports self and 1 adjacent willing creature up to 500'
Disguise Self (K1 [Mask Of Many Faces] Illu): Changes the appearance of self body and clothing for 1 hr; physical investigation detects the illusion
Dispel Magic (K3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Dominate Monster (K8 Ench): R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 8 hr]
Dream (K5 Illu): Touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates)
Eldritch Blast (K0 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell creates 2 rays that inflict 1d10 HP force each
Enthrall (K2 Ench): R60' Target suffers -10 Perception (save Wisdom negates; targets in battle automatically succeed) for concentration up to 1 min
Etherealness (K7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Expeditious Retreat (K1 Tran): Allows self to Dash immediately and then to use a bonus action to Dash each rd for concentration up to 10 min
Eyebite (K6 Necr): R60' Inflicts a choice of sleep, panic, or poisoned (save Wisdom negates) on 1 target per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Fear (K3 Illu): Creatures in a 30' cone drop held objects and flee (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Find Familiar (K1 [Pact Of The Chain] Conj): R10' Self gains the service of a summoned spirit in animal form that allows telepathic communication, remote sensing, and use of its reaction to deliver remote touch attacks when within 100' [R]
Finger Of Death (K7 Necr): R60' Target suffers 7d8+30 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) and becomes an obedient zombie if killed
Fire Shield (K4 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fire Shield (K4 [The Fiend] Evoc): Self emits a 10' bright light and gains resistance to a choice of heat or cold, and successful adjacent attackers suffer 2d8 HP fire or cold, for 10 min
Fireball (K3 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Fireball (K3 [The Fiend] Evoc): R150' 20' radius inflicts 8d6 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Flame Strike (K5 [The Fiend] Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 5d6 HP fire and 5d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP fire and radiant]
Fly (K3 Tran): Touched gains a 60' fly speed for concentration up to 10 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Forcecage (K7 Evoc): R100' Creates a choice of a 20' barred force cube or a 10' solid force box that can trap creatures inside (save Charisma allows magical escape) for concentration up to 1 hr
Foresight (K9 Divi): Touched gains advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr
Gaseous Form (K3 Tran): Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Gate (K9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Geas (K5 [Fiend Spells] Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic each day (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Glibness (K8 Ench): Self can take 15 on Charisma checks and always detects as truthful for 1 hr
Hallow (K5 [The Fiend] Evoc): 60' radius becomes warded against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect
Hallucinatory Terrain (K4 Illu): R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Hellish Rebuke (K1 Evoc): R60' Cast as a reaction, inflicts 2d10 HP fire on a successful attacker (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Hex (K1 Ench): R90' Self attacks on the target inflict +1d6 HP necrotic, and the target has disadvantage on a chosen ability, for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level extends the duration to 4, 8, or 24 hr at level 2, 3 or 5]
Hideous Laughter (K1 Ench): 1
Hold Monster (K5 Ench): R90' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hold Person (K2 Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Hypnotic Pattern (K3 Illu): R120' Creatures in a 30' cube become incapacitated (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min; taking damage or being shaken ends the effects
Illusory Script (K1 Illu): Alters the appearance of self writing on the target material, making its meaning clear only to specified creatures and those with truesight, for 10 days [R]
Imprisonment (K9 Abju): R30' Restrains the target in a chosen type of prison (save Wisdom negates and gives the target 24 hr immunity)
Insect Plague (K5 [Fiend Spells] Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Invisibility (K2 Illu): Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends [+Level affects +1 target]
Mage Hand (K0 Conj): R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Magic Circle (K3 Abju): R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr [+Level extends the duration +1 hr]
Major Image (K3 Illu): R120' Creates a 20' cube sight, sound, smell, and temperature illusion (Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level extends the duration to permanent at level 4]
Mind Spike (K2 Divi): R120' Inflicts 3d8 HP psychic and reveals the target's location for concentration up to 1 hr (save Wisdom half HP only) [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Minor Illusion (K0 Illu): R30' Creates the sound of 1 creature or a 5' cube image (Investigation detects) for 1 min
Mirror Image (K2 Illu): 3 duplicates allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with a 3 or higher on a d6 for each remaining duplicate, for up to 1 min
Mislead (K5 Illu): Makes self invisible and creates an illusory duplicate that can move 60' and share senses for concentration up to 1 hr; attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends the invisibility
Misty Step (K2 Conj): Teleports self 30'
Phantasmal Force (K2 [The Archfey] Illu): R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Phantasmal Force (K2 [The Great Old One] Illu): R60' Target perceives an illusion (save Intelligence negates; Investigation ends) that can inflict 2d8 HP psychic per rd for concentration up to 1 min
Planar Binding (K5 Abju): R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Plane Shift (K7 Conj): Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Poison Spray (K0 Necr): R30' Ranged spell inflicts 2d12 HP poison
Power Word Kill (K9 Ench): R60' Kills a target with up to 100 hit points; others suffer 12d12 HP psychic
Power Word Stun (K8 Ench): R60' Stuns a target with up to 150 HP (save Constitution each rd ends); others are have Speed 0 until the start of the next turn
Prestidigitation (K0 Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Protection From Evil And Good (K1 Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Ray Of Enfeeblement (K2 Necr): R60' Ranged spell inflicts disadvantage on Strength checks and -1d8 damage with Strength weapons (save Constitution disadvantage on the first attack before the start of the next turn only; additional saves each rd ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Remove Curse (K3 Abju): Frees a touched creature from all curses or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Scorching Ray (K2 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
Scorching Ray (K2 [The Fiend] Evoc): R120' 3 ranged attacks each inflict 2d6 HP fire [+Level gives +1 ranged attack]
Scrying (K5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Speak With Animals (K1 Divi): Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Spider Climb (K2 Tran): Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Stinking Cloud (K3 [Fiend Spells] Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stinking Cloud (K3 [The Fiend] Conj): R90' 20' radius inflicts poisoned and loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Suggestion (K2 Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Suggestion (K2 [Fiend Spells] Ench): R30' Target follows a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 8 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects
Teleportation Circle (K5 Conj): R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 365 days makes it permanent
Tongues (K3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
True Polymorph (K9 Tran): R30' Transforms the target creature into another creature or object (save Wisdom negates), or the target object into a creature, for concentration up to 1 hr; concentrating for a full hr makes the change permanent
True Seeing (K6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
True Strike (K0 Divi): Proficient weapon attack made simultaneously with casting has a +4 attack bonus and inflicts +1d6 HP of a choice of radiant or normal weapon damage
Unseen Servant (K1 Conj): R60' Creates an invisible force with Armor Class 10, 1 hit point, and Strength 2; a bonus action each rd can move it 15' and use it to perform simple tasks for 1 hr or until it is damaged [R]
Vampiric Touch (K3 Necr): Touch inflicts 3d6 HP necrotic, and self regains half as many hit points, for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Wall Of Fire (K4 [Fiend Spells] Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Wall Of Fire (K4 [The Fiend] Evoc): R120' Creates a 60'x20'x1' wall or a 20'x20'x1' ring that inflicts 5d8 HP fire (save Dexterity half) within 10' of a chosen side for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Weird (K9 Illu): R120' 30' radius inflicts frightened and 10d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom half HP only), then 5d10 HP psychic each rd (save Wisdom ends) for concentration up to 1 min
Magic Notes:
Eldritch Invocations: 7 selections
Contact Patron: Can use Contact Other Plane to contact patron once per long rest
Gift Of The Protectors: A creature who has written its name in the Book Of Shadows retains 1 hit point when reduced to 0 hit points once per long rest
Investment Of The Chain Master: Familiar gains a 40' fly or swim Speed, can inflict a choice of necrotic or radiant damage, and inflicts DC 12 saves; self can use a bonus action to command it to attack and a reaction to give it resistance to damage
Magic Initiate (Cleric): Knows 2 Cleric cantrips and can cast a chosen C1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Magical Cunning: Can use a 1 min process to regain 1 Pact Magic spell slot once per long rest
Mask Of Many Faces: Can cast Disguise Self at will
Pact Magic: Can cast spells from the Warlock spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
Pact Of The Blade: Can use a bonus action to create a bonded simple or martial pact weapon or to bond with a touched magic weapon and gain proficiency with it; it can be used as a spellcasting focus, and its Charisma-based attacks inflict a choice of necrotic, psychic, radiant, or normal weapon damage; moving 5' away from the weapon for 1 min ends the bond
Pact Of The Chain: Can cast Find Familiar without expending a spell slot
Visions Of Distant Realms: Can cast Arcane Eye at will
